portfolio: SMART Axiata x AIonOS Agentic Port Twin

agents.name: Yard Stack Optimization Agent
agents.mission: Continuously plans container stack locations and RTG/RMG move sequences to reduce re-handles and protect cut-offs.

agents.name: Berth & Crane Scheduling Twin
agents.mission: Simulates berth windows, crane gangs and move sequences under ETA, tide and weather uncertainty.

agents.name: Gate Appointment + Queue Agent
agents.mission: Resequences truck appointments and gate lanes based on live queue, release and yard capacity signals.

agents.name: Port Dispatch Orchestrator
agents.mission: Connects terminal operations with trucks, rail and ICDs to protect cut-offs and reduce corridor dwell.

agents.name: Vessel ETA + Berth Stay Predictor
agents.mission: Predicts arrival, berth stay and downstream plan disruption before it cascades into yard and gate operations.
agents.target: Higher ETA accuracy; lower berth idle time

agents.name: Equipment Health + Maintenance Agent
agents.mission: Predicts failures and shifts equipment allocation before breakdowns impact vessel or yard performance.
agents.target: Availability up; MTTR and vessel impact down

agents.name: Safety, Security + Compliance Agent
agents.mission: Detects unsafe movements and compliance deviations in high-risk port zones and creates auditable interventions.
agents.target: Near misses and severity down; audit readiness up

agents.name: Trade Documentation + Release Agent
agents.mission: Compresses document cycle time and reduces release disputes across shipping lines, customs and customers.
agents.target: Faster release; fewer exceptions and claims

agents.name: Energy, Reefer + ESG Agent
agents.mission: Converts energy, reefer and carbon signals into operational recommendations, not just reports.
agents.target: Peak load and energy cost down; carbon visibility up

agents.name: Billing, Demurrage + Revenue Leakage Agent
agents.mission: Aligns operational truth with contracts, invoices and waivers to recover missed charges and reduce disputes.

events: Yard Stack Agent detected export reefer dwell risk; proposed stack shift near Gate 3.
Berth & Crane Twin simulated ETA drift for Vessel KHM-472; berth swap improves SLA by 7.5 hours.
Gate Queue Agent throttled 18 early trucks; projected queue reduced by 22%.
Dispatch Orchestrator prioritized 11 containers for ICD departure cut-off.
Equipment Health Agent reserved hoist motor spare for RTG-07 based on thermal anomaly.
Documentation Agent matched eDO and BL; release exception auto-routed to customs desk.
Energy + ESG Agent shifted reefer load window; peak demand exposure reduced.
Billing Agent found missing demurrage charge code in customer invoice batch.
